overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a dense forest at night transitioning into a golden hour sunrise over a swamp wetland. The scene progresses from dark rainy conditions to bright clear skies as the sun rises above the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail at night

events.description: light rain falls in the dark forest creating atmospheric conditions
ambient light gradually increases as dawn begins to break

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow forest path with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense canopy surrounding the path on all sides
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the forest floor
grass and bushes lining the left side of the path
grass and bushes lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rainy night in a dense pine forest. Geralt walks forward along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall trees and undergrowth. The sky is barely visible through the thick canopy, and rain creates a moody atmosphere as dawn slowly begins to break.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning to open woodland at dawn

events.description: rain stops falling and the weather clears significantly
warm golden sunlight begins filtering through the thinning tree canopy

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward as the forest opens up and the morning light increases

entered.detail: brightening morning sky becoming visible through the trees ahead
individual pine trees spaced apart as the forest thins
individual pine trees spaced apart as the forest thins

segments.scene_description: As dawn breaks, the rain stops and the dense forest gives way to more open woodland. The sky becomes visible ahead with warm light filtering through scattered trees. Geralt continues along the widening path as the environment transitions from enclosed darkness to open morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp wetland at golden hour sunrise

events.description: exits the forest into an open swamp wetland with standing water surrounding the path
sun rises above the horizon creating dramatic golden hour lighting and long shadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the raised path through the flooded swamp toward the rising sun

entered.detail: standing water and flooded wetland area surrounding the left side of the path
standing water and flooded wetland area surrounding the right side of the path
leafless dead trees emerging from the swamp water
bright orange sun low on the horizon casting golden light across the landscape
dark silhouette of forest trees on the horizon beneath the rising sun

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide swamp wetland as the sun rises in a brilliant golden display. Standing water surrounds the path on both sides, with dead trees scattered throughout the marsh. Geralt walks toward the bright sunrise, leaving the forest behind as the landscape opens into a vast, misty wetland bathed in warm morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, rainy pine forest that gradually opens into a sun-drenched swamp wetland at dawn. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path under a thick canopy in a moody, rain-soaked atmosphere. As the rain stops and dawn breaks, the dense forest gives way to open woodland where warm light begins filtering through scattered trees. The scene then expands into a wide marshland as the sun rises in a brilliant golden display, replacing the enclosed darkness with a vast, misty landscape. Finally, the camera follows Geralt toward the bright horizon, moving past dead trees and standing water bathed in warm morning light.
